$comment: Authoring schema for a skill frontmatter block. see 6767-h § 3.1 for the full frontmatter specification.
title: SkillFrontmatter

name.$comment: Kebab-case skill identifier. see 6767-h § 3.1 for naming constraints.

version.$comment: SemVer string. Website gates require all published skills to carry a version. see 6767-h § 4.3 for the zero-warnings policy.
